upgrades.reason: The latest 1.x release includes critical security fixes for the high‑severity vulnerability. It is a major version bump, so review breaking changes in the migration guide before upgrading.
No newer version is available; the current 4.17.21 release already contains the necessary security patches.

The critical vulnerability requires a major upgrade to 1.2.8, which introduces breaking changes. Until the application can be refactored to use the new API, it is safer to keep the current version and monitor for a compatible patch.
